name: Master Roshi Training
description: Increases maximum health by 2,500 HP (1/4 of a bar).

name: Rush Attack Boost 1
description: Increases Rush Attack damage by 2.5%.

name: Rush Attack Boost 2
description: Increases Rush Attack damage by 5%.

name: Rush Attack Boost 3
description: Increases Rush Attack damage by 7.5%.

name: Smash Attack Boost 1
description: Increases Smash Attack damage by 2.5%.  Increases Rush Chain damage by 2.5%.

name: Smash Attack Boost 2
description: Increases Smash Attack damage by 5%.  Increases Rush Chain damage by 5%.

name: Smash Attack Boost 3
description: Increases Smash Attack damage by 7.5%.  Increases Rush Chain damage by 7.5%.

name: Ki Blast Attack Boost 1
description: Increases Rush Ki Blast damage by 2.5%.  Increases Smash Ki Blast damage by 2.5%.

name: Ki Blast Attack Boost 2
description: Increases Rush Ki Blast damage by 5%.  Increases Smash Ki Blast damage by 5%.

name: Ki Blast Attack Boost 3
description: Increases Rush Ki Blast damage by 7.5%.  Increases Smash Ki Blast damage by 7.5%.

name: Power Unleashed
description: Increases Burst Rush damage by 5%.

name: Finishing Blow
description: Increases Burst Meteor damage by 5%.

name: Blast Burst
description: Increases ki cost for Blasts by 1 bar.  Increases Blast damage by 5%.  Increases Blast Combo damage by 5%.

name: Ultimate Burst
description: Increases ki cost for Ultimate Blasts by 1 bar.  Causes stun when Sparking Mode ends after using Ultimate Blast.  Increases Ultimate Blast damage by 5%.

name: Blast Attack Boost 1
description: Increases Blast damage by 2.5%.  Increases Blast Combo damage by 2.5%.  Increases Ultimate Blast damage by 2.5%.

name: Blast Attack Boost 2
description: Increases Blast damage by 5%.  Increases Blast Combo damage by 5%.  Increases Ultimate Blast damage by 5%.

name: Blast Attack Boost 3
description: Increases Blast damage by 7.5%.  Increases Blast Combo damage by 7.5%.  Increases Ultimate Blast damage by 7.5%.

name: Super Warrior
description: Increases Rush Attack damage by 5% during Sparking Mode.

name: Draconic Aura
description: Increases armor break level by 3. Beats Power body and Light body.

name: Light Body
description: Increases bullet armor level by 3. Cannot be flinched by Ki Blasts (Giants and Sparking ignore this capsule).

name: Dragon Rush
description: Increases armor break level by 3 against Rush Attack category actions. Beats Power Body.

name: The Secret to Counters
description: Reduces Skill Count needed for Super Perceptions by 1 (minimum 1).

name: Fury!
description: Increases Blast damage by 5% at 75% HP.  Increases Blast damage by additional 5% (10% total) at 50% HP.  Increases Blast damage by additional 5% (15% total) at 25% HP.  Increases Blast Combo damage by same amounts.

name: Active Heart
description: Increases ki gained from landing attacks by 10%.

name: Indomitable Fighting Spirit
description: Increases ki gained from landing attacks by 20%.

name: Warming Up
description: Increases health recovery while on standby in Team Battles by 50%.

name: Ready for Anything
description: Increases ki recovery per second while on standby in Team Battles by 50%.

name: Z-Burst Dash Master
description: Reduces ki cost for Z-Burst Dashes by 50%.

name: The Secret to Z-Burst Dashes
description: Reduces ki cost for Z-Burst Dashes by 100% (free).

name: Proof of Friendship
description: Switch gauge starts at maximum.

name: Dragon Spirit
description: Increases skill gauge recovery speed by 25%.

name: Super Transformation
description: Reduces Skill Count needed for Transformations and Fusions by 1 (minimum 1).

name: Fighting Spirit
description: Increases Ultimate Blast damage by 5% at 75% HP.  Increases Ultimate Blast damage by additional 5% (10% total) at 50% HP.  Increases Ultimate Blast damage by additional 5% (15% total) at 25% HP.

name: Divine Blow
description: Increases Ultimate Blast damage by 5%.

name: Rising Fighting Spirit
description: Ki gauge starts at maximum.

name: Power of Namek
description: Increases all attack damage by 2.5% on Namek map. Increases Rush, Smash, Combo, Ki Blasts, Blasts, Ultimate Blasts, Throws, Parries, Pursuits.

name: Power of Earth
description: Increases all attack damage by 2.5% on Earth maps (excluding City Ruins and Hyperbolic Time Chamber). Increases Rush, Smash, Combo, Ki Blasts, Blasts, Ultimate Blasts, Throws, Parries, Pursuits.

name: Power of the Universe
description: Increases all attack damage by 2.5% on Tournament of Power map. Increases Rush, Smash, Combo, Ki Blasts, Blasts, Ultimate Blasts, Throws, Parries, Pursuits.

name: Perfect Guard
description: Take no damage while guarding.

name: Crisis Avoided
description: Reduces ki cost for Short Dashes by 10%.

name: Battle Control
description: Increases Switch gauge recovery by 50% in Team Battles.

name: Latent Power Unleashed 1
description: Ki gauge starts with 1 bar extra.

name: Latent Power Unleashed 2
description: Ki gauge starts with 2 bars extra.

name: Big Impact
description: Increases all Impact Action damage by 20% per DP advantage enemy has over you (stacks up to 5 times for 100% total).  Only active when enemy has 1-5 more DP than you.

name: Mind Breaker
description: Increases ki damage dealt after successful Guard Clash by 50%.

name: Waters Blessing
description: Regenerates 100 HP per second and 100 ki per second while in water (1 bar of health and ki every 100 seconds).

name: Miracle Master
description: Automatically dodges melee attacks when downed (excludes Ki Blasts).

name: Latent Power!
description: Increases damage resistance by 2.5% at 75% HP.  Increases damage resistance by additional 5% (7.5% total) at 50% HP.  Increases damage resistance by additional 7.5% (15% total) at 25% HP.

name: Guard Master
description: Grants immunity to Guard Clashes.

name: Mirage
description: Automatically dodges subsequent barrage Blasts after dodging one with High-Speed Movement or High-Speed Evasion.

name: Rising Tension
description: Recovers 1 bar of ki every 60 seconds

name: Melee Charge 1
description: Reduces charging time for Smash Attacks by 2%.  Reduces charging time for Rush Chains by 2%.

name: Melee Charge 2
description: Reduces charging time for Smash Attacks by 3%.  Reduces charging time for Rush Chains by 3%.

name: Melee Charge 3
description: Reduces charging time for Smash Attacks by 5%.  Reduces charging time for Rush Chains by 5%.

name: Energy Saver 1
description: Reduces ki cost for Rush Ki Blasts by 2%.  Reduces ki cost for Smash Ki Blasts by 2%.

name: Energy Saver 2
description: Reduces ki cost for Rush Ki Blasts by 3%.  Reduces ki cost for Smash Ki Blasts by 3%.

name: Energy Saver 3
description: Reduces ki cost for Rush Ki Blasts by 5%.  Reduces ki cost for Smash Ki Blasts by 5%.

name: Ki Blast Charge 1
description: Reduces charging time for Smash Ki Blasts by 2%.

name: Ki Blast Charge 2
description: Reduces charging time for Smash Ki Blasts by 3%.

name: Ki Blast Charge 3
description: Reduces charging time for Smash Ki Blasts by 5%.

name: Dragon Assault
description: Reduces ki cost for Vanishing Assaults by 15%.

name: Speed Up
description: Reduces ki cost for Short Dashes by 20%.

name: Exquisite Skill
description: Reduces self recovery time when stunned/restrained by 20%.  Increases enemy recovery time when stunned/restrained by 20%.

name: Ki Control
description: Reduces ki cost for Dragon Dashes by 25%.  Reduces automatic ki recovery by 5%.

name: The Secret to Dragon Dashes
description: Reduces ki cost for Dragon Dashes by 25%.

name: Savior
description: Activates Sparking Mode on first switch-in.  Only activates once per team in Team Battles.

name: Combo Master
description: Reduces combo damage scaling by 2.5%.

name: Combo King
description: Reduces combo damage scaling by 5%.

name: Sparking! Plus
description: Reduces Sparking Mode gauge decrease speed by 15%.  Reduces melee defense by 20%.  Reduces blast defense by 10%.

name: Style of the Strong
description: Reduces Sparking Mode gauge decrease speed by 15%.

name: Dragon Break
description: Increases Dragon Homing use limit by 1.

name: Dragon Crash
description: Increases Dragon Smash damage by 5%.

name: Vanishing Break
description: Increases Vanishing Attack use limit by 1.

name: Vanishing Crash
description: Increases Vanishing Attack damage by 5%.

name: Secret Measures
description: Grants 1 additional Skill Count.

name: Rush Ki Blast 1
description: Increases Rush Ki Blast speed by 5%.

name: Rush Ki Blast Count Boost
description: Increases Rush Ki Blast maximum count by 2.

name: Master Strike
description: Increases Rush Attack damage by 5%.  Increases Smash Attack damage by 5%.  Increases Rush Chain damage by 5%.  Reduces maximum health by 5,000 HP (half a bar).

name: Master Ki Blast
description: Increases Rush Ki Blast speed by 5%.  Reduces ki cost for Rush Ki Blasts by 5%.  Reduces ki cost for Smash Ki Blasts by 5%.  Reduces maximum health by 5,000 HP (half a bar).

name: Master Throw
description: Increases Throw damage by 5%.

name: High-Speed Movement Master
description: Reduces Sparking gauge cost for High-Speed Movements by 25%.  Reduces all defense by 20%.

name: The Secret to High-Speed Movements
description: Reduces Sparking gauge cost for High-Speed Movements by 25%.

name: Super Movement Master
description: Reduces Sparking gauge cost for Super Movements by 25%.  Reduces all defense by 20%.

name: The Secret to Super Movements
description: Reduces Sparking gauge cost for Super Movements by 25%.

name: Performer
description: Increases Blast by 5% for 30 seconds after using an emote for 1.5+ seconds.

name: Dragon Heart
description: Recovers 25% of Skill gauge after dodging a Blast or Ultimate Blast with High-Speed Movement.

name: King Kai Training
description: Increases maximum health by 5,000 HP (half a bar).

name: Super Sparking!
description: Increases Rush Attack damage by 5% during Sparking Mode.  Reduces Sparking Mode gauge decrease speed by 5%.

name: Brolys Ring
description: Prevents Transformations and Fusions during battle
